_comment: Parity fixtures for removeSize. Each fixture has existing size rows, a remove/delete request, the returned value, and the expected remaining rows after the action.

input.sizes: Existing rows from the `sizes` table. Fields: id, name, sort_order, is_hidden, is_removed.
input.request: Object passed to removeSize. Fields: id and action.

schema.expected: Object returned by removeSize, per js/data/contracts/removeSize.md.
schema.expectedState: Rows that should remain after remove/delete.

fixtures.name: 01-mark-used-size-removed
fixtures.description: Mark one size as removed and keep the row.

fixtures.name: 02-delete-unused-size
fixtures.description: Delete one size and keep a different size.

fixtures.name: 03-delete-missing-size
fixtures.description: Deleting a valid id that is already gone succeeds and leaves existing rows alone.
